title: pinalia pokharensis
intro: Pinalia pokharensis is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region, known for its unique and delicate characteristics. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Pinalia pokharensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health-promoting effects.
